title: Scorched Guns 2
description: A pack featuring a variety of guns, mobs, dungeons and more!
body:
Now Requires [Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios/files/5843594) and [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/5675221)
and [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework/files/5911986)
   SCORCHED GUNS V2 is a total standalone remake featuring a massive arsenal of over 40 guns, from muskets, to shotguns and machineguns, to automatic missile launchers, and rayguns. Discover new resources, battle formidable enemies, and explore treacherous dungeons in this expansive Minecraft mod.



New Weapons:

Progress from blackpowder firearms to advanced copper, iron, treated brass, and diamond steel weaponry.
Unique weapons crafted from blueprints found in buried treasure, bastions, ancient cities, and end cities.



Attachments:

Scopes: Reflex, Medium, or Long scopes provide different magnefication, or go tactical with a Laser Sight.
Magazines: Attach a Extended Mag to increase magazine capactity, or a Speed Mag to increase reload speed.
Underbarrel: Use different grips to provide stabilization, or attach different bayonets for melee strikes or Bayonet Charges, which increases damage based on player speed.
Stocks: Use different stocks to increase stability of weapon.
Barrels: Attach Silencers to stealthily take out mobs, useful as some certain mobs dont appreciate loud gun shots. Or muzzle brakes to decrease spread. 



Explosives:

Molotov Cocktail: Creates fire in a large area.
Grenade: Explodes, dealing damage.
Choke Bomb: Puts out fire and mobs.
Swarm Bomb: Summons a swarm of bugs to attack your target.



Healing Items:

Various tiers of healing items for survival



Enemies:

Face off against 10 new mobs including Zombie Redcoats, Illager Blunderers, Skycarriers, Cog Knights, Cog Minions, Hives, and more.



Resources:

Find Anthralite and Sulfur ore in themines.
Niter from ocean Geothermal Vents,collect using Vent Collectors.
Rare vehement coal in the Nether
Use these materials to create the powerful Scorched ingot.

Dungeons:

Explore new dungeons like Trenches, the Asgharian tower, and Osgood lab.
Find blueprints in Dungeons, Bastions, The Ancient Cities and from the new Gunsmith Villager in villages or by using the new Gun Bench.



Crafting Stations:

Mechanical Press: Used to make casings and press bullets.
Macerator: Grind down materials to create mixtures like Gunpowder, Sheol dust, and More .
Gun Bench: Use blueprints to craft different tiers of weapons.



Unique Features:

Supply Scamp: Tame with ancient brass, this cowardly mobile storage unit can be customized with dyes to change its mask.
Geothermal Vents: Structures in oceans emitting niter, which can be used to make gunpowder and niter glass. Niter glass changes transparency when powered by redstone.
Ammo Boxes: Can be used to store ammunition, featuring a dynamic model that changes based off its contents.

Compatabilities:

Features Compatability with Create, allowing weapon creation with Mechanical Crafting, processing of the mods resources, and creating ammo with the Sequenced Assembly.

Immersive engineering compatability, with this Press, and crusher.

If farmers delight is loaded, you can create an Anthralite Knife


Thanks to [MigaMi](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/migami/followers) for Just Enough Guns, which helped immensely in the development of this mod, and to [zaeonNineZero](https://www.curseforge.com/members/zaeonninezero/projects), for his fork of CGM, which provided lots of wonderful UI aspects.
